storyInfo: Propeller Paradise is about to connect to D.C. Before the exhibition opens, Gordon realizes the speech prepared by Gustave is actually an apology. Gustave and Maylander appear to be planning an accident at the exhibition in front of everyone.

attributes.content: Attention all company representatives and testers: Propeller Paradise will link up with D.C. in two hours.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: The park's broadcast will begin once we're in range of the intercity net. Please make sure your exhibits are all functioning optimally. Air Expo Columbia is about to begin!
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: Look, that's Tower Mountains' finbeast airship! I heard they made a lot of last minute modifications and greatly improved its heat resistance.
attributes.name: Oakley
Oakley
attributes.content: And that solar-powered hover kitchen kit! With a power source that works even beyond the Starpod... I've been curious ever since I first read the brochure!

attributes.name: Oakley
attributes.content: Whoa!
Good thing you only hit the window rail, instead of getting your whole head stuck in there.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The expo's about to begin. Aren't you nervous at all?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Relax. Professionals always have an escape plan ready. I'll get you out when the time's right.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You want to leave already?
N-No, sir! Of course not!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Whatever, I'm just here to hand over some stuff.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: That's a lot of papers. Are these records and investigation forms? And the name on them—Ferne Barn?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Vandalizing public property, theft of cultural relics, trespassing, impersonating a guide... why's a little indie guide worth your trouble to scrutinize five years of work history?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: We just need your signature down here, and you'll spend the rest of your life in jail introducing folks to handcuffs and shackles.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: What do you want?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The expo's about to begin, but we need more hands on deck. We can't afford to lock up the park's only two guides, that would waste time and resources.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: But there are too many records with your name on them, and you're connected to Nasti Lunorey.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: So you've decided to threaten me?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Stay in line, and this is a chance to wipe your rap sheets clean, you know.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Seems like I don't have a choice.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Save your thanks for Gustave. He was the one who proposed it to the Maylander Emergency Management Council. The two of you would be missing out on this expo marking the beginning of a new era without him.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: I'm sure you heard the broadcast too. Before the park plate drives into the intercity net's range and begins the live stream, make sure you're fully prepared to introduce the future to every Columbian out there.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: I get it. I'll finish all the studio work, and won't leave the park before the expo ends.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Good deal.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Then come on out, you two. Time to get to work.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: 'On behalf of all Leithanians, I express my most sincere congratulations for the upcoming Air Expo Columbia to be held on the experimental Propeller Paradise.'
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Take a guess, who signed it in the end?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Conductor of the Güldenes...gesatz, uh, Guardian of the Nine Kreise... anyway, one with a string of titles neither of us could pronounce—
The Kaiserin.
The late Maylander Sr. always said those with a keen sense for politics never lose it, and it seems that holds true.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Miss Wilson.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I'd rather keep a keen sense for wine-tasting, honestly.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: Laterano took half a century to hold their Summit of Nations, an event you could say was the largest diplomatic event on Terra in nearly two centuries, yet Leithanien only sent over a few insignificant dukes as delegates.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: But our tiny Air Expo Columbia has got a personal letter of congratulations from the Kaiserin...
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Mr. Vice President, Propeller Paradise has sent over a gift. A bunch of balloons in the shape of the President, most of which are already decorating the hallways.
attributes.name: Vice President's Secretary

attributes.content: Thank you, Pavard.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Perhaps you could return the Kaiserin's wishes with a balloon like that one?
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: And let the Gesatzswächter and Spire Casters spend three days carefully dismantling it into rubber scrap?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: It seems to be an average balloon for decorative purposes.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: I fear that is no longer the case, since the letter was penned by the Kaiserin. It'll 'transform' into the most cutting-edge military tech—an aerial bomb disguised as a balloon, sent floating into another country's airspace.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: And how many congratulations like that have you received?
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: Let's see. Victorian Grand Dukes, the Ursine Speaker, the Grand Knight of Kazimierz... I'll run out of fingers to count on.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: The VP before me spent four years worrying about immigration and tariffs, but me?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Impregnable cities got captured, a never-changing sky got ripped open, and a long-silent ocean began to speak.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: After all that, the core nations unanimously decided 'balloons are always aerial bombs in disguise'.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: And what about us?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Oh, this balloon of ours can't even fly.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Before the balloons were sent over, the flammable hydrogen got replaced with regular air... for safety reasons, of course.
attributes.name: Vice President's Secretary

attributes.content: How safe and careful we Columbians are.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: This sounds like a serious matter of national security, but you're discussing it with a retiree...?
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: Inside the State Building, the finest reception hall in all of D.C., even?
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: It's hard to imagine retirement making things any different for Jara Booker Wilson.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: My hospitality is hardly befitting the once Eternally Shining Star, or Rhine Lab's former Director of HR.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: These days, people seem more willing to be moved by a legend or miracle than by politics or promises.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Even the most rational congressmen are no exception.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: If you're referring to the few meetings I had with Congressman Wayne, I believe you've already expressed your gratitude... with those unique souvenirs from Kjerag.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: That was just a personal token of my gratitude. Besides, I later realized the scientists at the observation station must have sent you something similar before.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: If you show up and give the right people the chance to put hydrogen back into Columbia's balloons, I'm sure I won't be the only one in line to thank you.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: To my understanding, the most suitable people to do it would be those who made the balloon in the first place.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: I've stepped in on their behalf quite a few times.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: Researchers are as sincere as children. I can never bear to see their hopes dashed.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: You're right that retirement has made no difference to me whatsoever, though.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: Of course, we all know how important Rhine is to you.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Look. Propeller Paradise... you don't even need binoculars to see it anymore.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: We need only wait and see what they'll turn Columbia's balloons into.
attributes.name: Jara

attributes.content: Look! This high-altitude adaptive balloon in the shape of the President is one of our hot souvenirs!
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: A thin film on the balloon's surface automatically adjusts its molecular structure according to the environment, so it won't explode, even if it collides with the Barrier.
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: Think about it, Miss! Just how many balloons could we fit under the Barrier?
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: I remember agents are required to pass a university-level physics fundamentals exam.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Isn't this park's purpose to push the boundaries of physics itself?
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Are you implying those samples and snacks on you are for research purposes?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Satisfied chewing)
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Just for disguise purposes. I'm about to buy some fresh cotton candy planets over at platform four—a small vacuum chamber that can simulate the birth and development of Terra... don't you think it romantic?
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: At least, that's less boring than having to transport a special someone.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Special... you mean that Banshee?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Yeah, the one you were in charge of before.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: So the Tin Man already knew...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: He said you had an urgent mission to handle, so we'll take over evacuating the special individual.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Væla in bad shape. You'll have to be very careful.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I know, an old Banshee has to be skilled in witchcraft, no? We'll set up cognitive interference detectors to make sure nothing goes awry.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Cognitive interference? But she's already being tormented by her shattered memories—
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Man, where my colleagues at? We have to evacuate all park personnel from the levitation layer in the next half hour, or I won't get to buy any souvenirs.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: This is the last chance we'll get to see such weird stuff.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: I think you should go buy your cotton candy planets. They won't be coming.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Huh? I—
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: I'm... at the ropeway station?
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Right, I gotta go to platform four, or I'll miss out on the cotton candy.
attributes.name: Tester?

attributes.content: Madam Væla, my apologies, but I only bought you thirty minutes.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Act on your desires. You're free.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The door, is open.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Guiding me... home?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: ...But where is... Nasti...?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: There's still an hour before the broadcast begins. Which necktie should I wear...?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Tch. Is Gustave still deciding who will make the opening speech? Drag it out any longer and we'll have no time to prepare the script!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: An hour won't be enough to list all my countless contributions to the park. There are also the many organizations and departments to thank for all the help they've given me, they deserve the recognition...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Everything will go as planned, surely...?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: What am I thinking!? We may not get along, but there's no way he'll side with a Kuranta he's only known for a few days.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: *sigh* Even at the very end, Gustave never changes. Using every trick up his sleeve to keep his lackeys in line, just to make them do as they're told.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: We're like a bunch of kids. Getting all nervous over a little prize we deserve.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: How come Five-Four's not back yet? Wasn't it supposed to just check the office for any news?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Who's that?!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: ...A letter?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I knew it... I knew it!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: After hesitating for so long, he settles on the obvious choice, me!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: How much effort did I put in just to snatch the opportunity to transfer here? How much did I have to finagle to climb the ladder from my lowly admin job in six months?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'm the chief executive of Propeller Paradise, I'm the only one who can front it!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Oh, he even wrote a speech for me? That sly old fox, never leaves anything to chance.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: 'My fellow Columbians, I am Gordon Tannen, the chief executive of Propeller Paradise. I'm sure I've kept you waiting in front of your screens for some time now.'
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: 'Now, it is with a heavy heart that I announce the official cancellation of Air Expo Columbia. A major accident occurred in the park, and as the one in charge of the place, I bear an undeniable responsibility for this...'
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Wait, an accident? Is this a mistake? This is a—
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: A public apology?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Alert! Alert!
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Patrol complete, letter not obtained. Part of the path has been blocked by a group of Terrans. Based on their travel route, they are presumably heading toward the levitation layer's experiment zone.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast
Space Finbeast
attributes.content: At the same time, detecting several high-powered Originium products on the move, bearing cargo identification tags...

attributes.name: Space Finbeast
attributes.content: They belong to Gordon Tannen.
My tags...?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: An apology letter, and the news brought back by Five-Four... This is no mischievous prophecy, but indisputable reality.
Shock, panic, anger... countless emotions fill Gordon's chest.
Is Gustave about to cause an accident? On Propeller Paradise, the expo all of Columbia has been eagerly waiting to see?
For what reason? When did he begin planning this? What sort of pawn is 'Gordon Tannen' to him?
'Apology', 'Amends'—Gordon is all too familiar with these words. Ostracized by his colleagues and driven by his eccentric hobby, he was always 'violating the rules'.
The thin sheet of paper before him reflects the cumulation of his work over the past seven years.
He wrote hundreds of self-reflection letters during his time at ATAO. He remembers every single time Gustave would demand an apology from him, and how he slid from defiance to compromise.
The reward he deserved, the things he begged Gustave for like a child—were accusations against him all along.
Did you get the speech, Tannen?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: So? Can you do it?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: His carefully chosen necktie tightens, like a torture device.
All I have to do, is do as I'm told.
attributes.name: Gordon
